title: 5pc Universal Tweezer Set Stainless Steel, 5"
description:
This 5pc tweezer set is useful for a variety of applications. These stainless steel tweezers are all between 4" and 5" and feature different tips for different uses. The shovel tip on the stamp tweezers is perfect for handling flat broad objects that may be too delicate for pointed tweezers. The bent tip tweezers are designed for grasping small stones and components, while the solder/utility tweezers are ideal for holding small wires in place. Having 5 different tweezers makes this set quite versatile, as there is one for any situation. Whether you're beading, soldering, repairing watches or jewelry, or even simply removing a splinter, there is a tweezer in this set for you.

5pc Universal Tweezer Set Stainless Steel, 5"

This 5pc tweezer set is useful for a variety of applications.

Key Features

  • Set includes: sharp point tweezers (4.5"), stamp tweezers (4.75"), general tweezers (4"), solder/utility tweezers (4.5"), bent tip tweezers (4.5")
  • Lengths between 4" - 5"

Product Specifications

  • MPN: U5SSTS-5
  • UPC: 829957493815
  • Color: Grey
  • Size: Small
